summary.title: Mafiking — Production Threat Model
summary.description: STRIDE-based DFD for the production deployment of Mafiking on Nevacloud VPS. Captures the trust boundaries, assets, and mitigations documented across the security docs in this repository.

diagram.title: Mafiking production
diagram.description: Browser → Cloudflare DNS (optional) → Nevacloud VPS (nginx + ModSecurity + node) → SQLite / Clerk / Duitku / Gemini / Gemma / DeepSeek / Backblaze B2.

shapes.name: End user (browser)
shapes.description: Student or guest. Owns session cookies; can be a paying customer.

shapes.name: Admin (browser)
shapes.description: Has Mafiking role = 'admin'. Can access /SOP-* docs, /api/admin/*, /api/import/*.

shapes.name: Clerk SDK (browser)
shapes.description: Third-party Clerk auth widget loaded from clerk.mafiking.com subdomains via Clerk publishable key.

shapes.name: DNS / edge (Cloudflare or registrar)
shapes.description: Resolves mafiking.com to 202.155.94.210. Optional Cloudflare proxy in front for L7 DDoS.

shapes.name: VPS — nginx + ModSecurity
shapes.description: Edge proxy. TLS 1.2+1.3, HSTS preload, ModSecurity CRS 3.3.2 detection-only. Reverse proxies to node on 127.0.0.1:3000.

shapes.name: VPS — Node app (port 3000)
shapes.description: Express + helmet + csrf-csrf + express-rate-limit. 93 routes. Listens only on 127.0.0.1:3000.

shapes.name: SQLite database
shapes.description: /opt/mafiking/data/mafiking.sqlite, mode 0700, owned by mafiking service user. Backed up daily to B2 via sqlite3 .backup.

shapes.name: Clerk API (clerk.mafiking.com)
shapes.description: Identity provider. Issues session JWTs, sends svix webhooks for /api/webhooks/clerk.

shapes.name: Duitku payment gateway
shapes.description: Indonesian payment aggregator. POSTs callback to /api/payment/callback with HMAC signature.

shapes.name: Google Gemini API
shapes.description: Image / math OCR for /api/correction. Sends sanitized user text only.

shapes.name: Gemma 4 31B (profile provider)
shapes.description: Adaptive profile generator. Server-side prompts only — no user data crosses this boundary.

shapes.name: DeepSeek (admin import)
shapes.description: Question draft generator for admin-only /api/import/deepseek. Server-side prompts.

shapes.name: Backblaze B2 (encrypted)
shapes.description: Offsite backup. rclone crypt over b2:mafiking-backups. 30-day retention.

flows.name: Admin HTTPS request
flows.description: Same as user, but with admin role on session.

flows.name: Clerk widget load (browser)
flows.description: Clerk JS loaded from clerk.mafiking.com subdomain. Publishable key derived from VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY.

flows.name: Reverse proxy (127.0.0.1:3000)
flows.description: Proxies to node. Adds X-Real-IP, X-Forwarded-Proto, X-Forwarded-For.

flows.name: SQLite read/write
flows.description: better-sqlite3. WAL mode. BOLA check: WHERE user_id = req.session.userId.

flows.name: Clerk API call
flows.description: Server uses CLERK_SECRET_KEY. Webhook receiver at /api/webhooks/clerk verifies svix signature.

flows.name: Duitku payment create
flows.description: Browser redirected to Duitku hosted page. HMAC-signed request from server side.

flows.name: Duitku callback
flows.description: Server-to-server POST to /api/payment/callback with HMAC signature. CSRF exempt, Idempotency-Key required.

flows.name: Gemini OCR / evaluate
flows.description: User text sanitized via server/security/text-sanitize.js before send. LaTeX preserved, control chars stripped.

flows.name: Gemma profile call
flows.description: Server-side prompt only, no user input.

flows.name: DeepSeek import
flows.description: Admin-only /api/import/deepseek. Server-side prompt; admin uploads document.

flows.name: Encrypted backup
flows.description: Daily 03:00 UTC. rclone crypt over b2:mafiking-backups. Daily snapshot via sqlite3 .backup + rsync.

threats.title: XSS via unsanitized innerHTML (profile page)
threats.description: User-supplied text flowed into profile.jsx via innerHTML. Two specific instances: renderRecommendationQuestionHTML and an h4 heading. Both were assigning to innerHTML with no escaping.
mitigations: src/pages/profile.jsx:160 and :586 — both now use window.escapeHtml
scan-xss-patterns.js enforces escapeHtml on every innerHTML assign
helmet CSP blocks inline event handlers

threats.title: BOLA — user can read another user's data
threats.description: User-scoped routes must filter by req.session.userId. Audited via api-inventory.md.
mitigations: api-inventory.md — every user-scoped route shows WHERE clause
No app-level ownership leak found in audit

threats.title: CSRF on state-changing endpoints
threats.description: All 25 state-changing routes verified to require csrf-csrf double-submit token. /api/webhooks/clerk, /api/payment/callback, /api/csp-report[/], /api/performance/vitals are exempt by design.

threats.title: Brute-force login
threats.description: Repeated login attempts against /api/auth/login.
mitigations: fail2ban: mafiking-auth jail 8 fails / 10 min -> 24h ban

threats.title: Payment callback spoofing
threats.description: Duitku callback must be HMAC-verified; replays blocked by Idempotency-Key.
mitigations: HMAC SHA-256 of (merchantCode + amount + merchantOrderId + apiKey)
Idempotency-Key header required for state mutation

threats.title: LLM prompt injection via user-submitted text
threats.description: User text sent to Gemini for OCR/evaluation could contain prompt injection.
mitigations: server/security/text-sanitize.js — 4000 char cap, control/bidi/zero-width strip, LaTeX preserved
Applied to all Gemini-bound fields in server/routes/correction.js

threats.title: Webhook spoofing (Clerk)
threats.description: Forged webhooks impersonating Clerk could elevate session roles.
mitigations: request body stored raw, then verified

threats.title: Account takeover via session fixation
threats.description: Session ID rotates on login. __Host- cookie scoped to host only.
mitigations: __Host-mafiking.sid cookie in prod (no Domain, Path=/, Secure)

threats.title: SQLite tampering via filesystem
threats.description: Compromised process could corrupt SQLite. Resolved by mode 0700 + daily sqlite3 .backup to B2.
mitigations: mafiking.sqlite mode 0700 owned by service user

threats.title: Exposed node debug port or stack trace
threats.description: Stack traces could leak file paths and internals.
mitigations: Helmet + no stack traces in production (NODE_ENV=production)

threats.title: L7 DDoS
threats.description: Application-layer flood from a small botnet.
mitigations: Optional Cloudflare in front (not yet enabled)

threats.title: Privilege escalation via /api/admin/*
threats.description: Audit confirms server/middleware/admin.js checks req.session.role === 'admin' on every admin route.
mitigations: server/middleware/admin.js + server/middleware/auth.js on every admin route
api-inventory.md: 40+ admin routes catalogued with role check

threats.title: CSP bypass via Tailwind CDN
threats.description: Tailwind CDN requires 'unsafe-inline' in style-src. Migration to a build step would remove this.
mitigations: Nonces are still used for inline event handlers

threats.title: VPS compromise via SSH
threats.description: Initial Ubuntu 22.04 image allows PermitRootLogin + PasswordAuthentication.
mitigations: ops/sshd-hardening.conf disables root + password, allows key-only
fail2ban sshd jail 4 fails / 10 min -> 24h ban

threats.title: Supply-chain attack via npm dependency
threats.description: A typosquatted or compromised npm package could exfiltrate secrets.
mitigations: GitHub Actions: npm-audit, CycloneDX SBOM, TruffleHog on every commit
package-lock.json committed; ci uses npm ci

threats.title: Data exfiltration via DAST/crawler probing
threats.description: Probing for /api/admin, /api/users, /api/payment secrets.
mitigations: ModSecurity rule id:10011 blocks scanner User-Agents

threats.title: Backup exfiltration
threats.description: Compromised credentials to rclone could leak encrypted backups.
mitigations: rclone crypt: client-side AES-256 with separate crypt password

threats.title: LLM data exfiltration via crafted image
threats.description: Gemini OCR could pull text from images that includes other users' data; F-11 EXIF strip on upload is not yet implemented.
mitigations: F-11 deferred to Phase 4 follow-up — would add sharp EXIF strip

threats.title: Replay attack on payment callback
threats.description: Replayed Duitku callback could double-credit a payment.

threats.title: Misconfigured firewall rule
threats.description: accidentally opening 3000/tcp or 22/tcp to all.
mitigations: ufw default deny incoming, allow outgoing
